name: qingteng-hids-v3-4
description: OctoBus package for QingTeng HIDS V3.4 login, host asset query, and host isolation APIs.

QingTeng_HIDS_V34.QingTeng_HIDS_V34/Logi.name: login
QingTeng_HIDS_V34.QingTeng_HIDS_V34/Logi.description: Log in to QingTeng HIDS with configured bindings.

QingTeng_HIDS_V34.QingTeng_HIDS_V34/Quer.name: query-host-assets
QingTeng_HIDS_V34.QingTeng_HIDS_V34/Quer.description: Query QingTeng host assets by IP and system type.

QingTeng_HIDS_V34.QingTeng_HIDS_V34/Crea.name: create-host-isolation
QingTeng_HIDS_V34.QingTeng_HIDS_V34/Crea.description: Create QingTeng host isolation for agent IDs.

QingTeng_HIDS_V34.QingTeng_HIDS_V34/Dele.name: delete-host-isolation
QingTeng_HIDS_V34.QingTeng_HIDS_V34/Dele.description: Delete QingTeng host isolation for agent IDs.
